title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Support screen shows correct App data when switching from Guest account to unlinked account, with Tenant name and ID absent
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
3. Verify that you are logged in as Guest (no account linked).
4. Navigate to Support section (e.g., via Account → Support or Settings → Support).
5. Observe the App data card and note the displayed values.
6. Log out of the Guest session and log into an account that is not linked to any Tenant.
7. Navigate back to Support → App data.
8. Observe the App data card again and compare with the Guest state.
expected: When logged in as Guest: App version is correct, Tenant name/ID and User ID are None, Last connected is unknown. After logging into an unlinked account: Account information (e.g., User ID) is displayed, but Tenant name and Tenant ID are not present on the card.
